sql.if: AND ( B.BBS_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BBS_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(B.BBS_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(B.BBS_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.insert:
SELECT BBS_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BBS_BOARD ( BBS_NO, DEPT_CD, EMP_ID, BBS_NM, BBS_CN, BBS_TYPE, BBS_CNT, BBS_DT, FILE_ID, BBS_DEL_YN, BBS_LIKE_CNT, BBS_DISLIKE_CNT, BBS_RECOM_CNT ) VALUES ( #{bbsNo}, #{deptCd}, #{empId}, #{bbsNm}, #{bbsCn}, #{bbsType}, 0, SYSDATE, #{fileId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'N', 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT B.BBS_NO, B.BBS_NM, B.BBS_CN, B.BBS_DT, B.BBS_CNT, B.FILE_ID, B.EMP_ID, B.BBS_LIKE_CNT, B.BBS_DISLIKE_CNT, B.BBS_RECOM_CNT, B.BBS_TYPE, B.BBS_REPORT_CNT, E.EMP_NM, D.DEPT_NM, NVL(AV.AVT_SAVE_NM, E.EMP_PROFILE) AS EMP_PROFILE,
FD.FILE_DTL_ID, FD.FILE_DTL_O_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_PATH, FD.FILE_DTL_EXT,
(SELECT MAX(BBS_NO) FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO < #{bbsNo} AND BBS_DEL_YN = 'N') AS PREV_NO, (SELECT BBS_NM FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO = (SELECT MAX(BBS_NO) FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO < #{bbsNo} AND BBS_DEL_YN = 'N')) AS PREV_TTL, (SELECT MIN(BBS_NO) FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO > #{bbsNo} AND BBS_DEL_YN = 'N') AS NEXT_NO, (SELECT BBS_NM FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO = (SELECT MIN(BBS_NO) FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO > #{bbsNo} AND BBS_DEL_YN = 'N')) AS NEXT_TTL FROM BBS_BOARD B INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON B.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON B.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN AVATAR AV ON EA.AVT_NO = AV.AVT_NO LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON B.FILE_ID = FD.FILE_ID WHERE B.BBS_NO = #{bbsNo} AND B.BBS_DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT C.CMNT_NO, C.CMNT_BBS_NO, C.EMP_ID, C.CMNT_CN, C.CMNT_DT, C.CMNT_UP_NO, C.CMNT_DEL_YN, E.EMP_NM, NVL(AV.AVT_SAVE_NM, E.EMP_PROFILE) AS empProfile FROM BBS_COMMENT C INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON C.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN AVATAR AV ON EA.AVT_NO = AV.AVT_NO WHERE C.CMNT_BBS_NO = #{bbsNo} AND C.CMNT_DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY NVL(NULLIF(C.CMNT_UP_NO, 0), C.CMNT_NO) DESC, C.CMNT_DT ASC

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.BBS_TYPE = '부서공지' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, B.BBS_NO DESC ) AS RNUM, B.BBS_NO, B.DEPT_CD, B.EMP_ID, B.BBS_NM, B.BBS_TYPE, B.BBS_CNT, B.BBS_DT, B.FILE_ID, B.BBS_REPORT_CNT, E.EMP_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_DETAIL FD WHERE FD.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID) AS FILE_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BBS_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.CMNT_BBS_NO = B.BBS_NO AND BC.CMNT_DEL_YN = 'N') AS REPLY_COUNT FROM BBS_BOARD B INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON B.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE B.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND B.BBS_DEL_YN = 'N'
) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY T.RNUM ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BBS_BOARD B INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON B.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE B.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND B.BBS_DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_NM = #{bbsNm}, BBS_CN = #{bbsCn}, BBS_TYPE = #{bbsType}, FILE_ID = #{fileId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BBS_REPORT_CNT = 0 WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
mapper.select: SELECT EMP_ID FROM BBS_BOARD WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_LIKE_CNT = NVL(BBS_LIKE_CNT, 0) + 1 WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_LIKE_CNT = CASE WHEN BBS_LIKE_CNT > 0 THEN BBS_LIKE_CNT - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_DISLIKE_CNT = NVL(BBS_DISLIKE_CNT, 0) + 1 WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_DISLIKE_CNT = CASE WHEN BBS_DISLIKE_CNT > 0 THEN BBS_DISLIKE_CNT - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_RECOM_CNT = NVL(BBS_RECOM_CNT, 0) + 1 WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
UPDATE BBS_BOARD SET BBS_RECOM_CNT = CASE WHEN BBS_RECOM_CNT > 0 THEN BBS_RECOM_CNT - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_ACTIONS (BBS_NO, EMP_ID, ACTION_TYPE) VALUES (#{bbsNo}, #{empId}, #{actionType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOARD_ACTIONS WHERE BBS_NO = #{bbsNo} AND EMP_ID = #{empId} AND ACTION_TYPE = #{actionType}
